text.message: Makes sense. 6,5,11 I guess too good for OJ
I thought red would just go 9,4,11
Yeah good result for black and I
red knew that they will also get 4 9 11 eventually
If I was OJ I would have just taken 9,4,11
I just realised oj and I are blocked
But we both have terrible set ups?
Wouldn’t you two block each other?
I didn’t even see who blocked us tbf
Oj never ahead surely? Look at his set up
I cant even get road and super far from army
having to do that was even more tragic than a 7
Yeah that’s a brutal port haha
I mean I don’t think anyone beating black here
Surprised red didn’t consider black a threat
says the person ahead of black
I’m in a great spot to finish second I agree
But we ain’t beating you and you know it
You did get a great result with red picking a weaker spot and the domino affect of that
roads and one more settle gets you to 9
and you can do that easily
True. I’m winning and you’re in last!
then you need a lucky pull or good 10 rolls
I would trade spots if I could though I guess
Block you’re army comp bro hah
You deserve it though or I could get really lucky as well
Yeah I have no winning rolls
Not now anyway for you. Nice mono I guess
Apart from the first settles I guess
I though you were saying gg you won
unless red has the second mono
